name: Atlas and the Stars
overview: Atlas is determined to set off for the stars, but things take a wild turn when her attempt to steal a starship doesn’t go as planned. After mysteriously getting tossed across universes, Atlas and Atmosphere have no choice but to team up together if they ever want to make it off of the strange dying planet, Quasonia.
